planner_hint: Terdis is a Rust Tetris implementation. Game logic lives in src/. The project uses Cargo — a Cargo.toml must exist at the repo root. Integration tests go in tests/. The pipeline runs `cargo test` with JSON output.
test_hint: Write integration tests in tests/ as separate .rs files. Each file is a test binary — do not add a main(). Use #[test] attribute. Reference the crate by name (use terdis::...). Keep tests focused on one spec entry per file.
coding_hint: Implement in src/. Use safe Rust only. No external dependencies beyond what is already in Cargo.toml — do not add new crate dependencies. Expose all types and functions needed by tests as pub.
